baseline_version: PRD v1.5 - Client feedback integrated May 2026

client_status_mapping.rationale: Client PDF lists Under review and Completed as operational statuses. PRD v1.6 keeps seven operational statuses and tracks document review and settlement separately so Performed stays atomic and billing closure does not collide with driver completion.

mappings.prd_document_review: Missing or Uploaded until first post-Performed upload

mappings.ui_display_note: Admin/driver UI may show Under review when document_review_summary is Under Review
Admin UI may show Completed when settlement is Closed and required documents are accepted
Same; cancellationActor records driver, admin, or customer

auto_transitions: On first tour-linked document upload after operational Performed, set job document_review_summary to Under Review and trigger admin notification.
Admin sets settlement to Closed when order is fully checked and documented for billing; UI may display client term Completed.

marketplace_sync_policy.publish_visibility: When an admin publishes a Draft job, it becomes visible to authorized drivers on the next marketplace data fetch. There is no guaranteed sub-second real-time push to open marketplace screens in Version 1.
marketplace_sync_policy.auto_sync: Version 1 does not require continuous real-time list mutation while the driver watches the marketplace. Jobs load when the marketplace opens and when the driver uses pull-to-refresh.
marketplace_sync_policy.manual_refresh: Pull-to-refresh remains meaningful: drivers can check for newly published jobs and status changes without relying on live sync.
marketplace_sync_policy.direct_assign: Directly assigned jobs never appear in the marketplace; only Published jobs are listed.

answers_to_client_questions.newly_published_visible_immediately: Visible after publish on next fetch (open marketplace or pull-to-refresh), not via live WebSocket in V1.
answers_to_client_questions.list_updated_automatically: On marketplace open and pull-to-refresh; not continuous background sync while screen is idle.

driver_visibility_matrix.notes: Customer is Autheon contractual driver context for the driver after commitment
At least postal code prefix for decision-making
At least postal code prefix for decision-making
Before acceptance at least dates relevant to driver decision; full windows in tour detail after commitment
Limited preview may include axle type and self-drive hints; full notes after commitment

notification_channels_matrix.notes: Replacement or second upload on same tour
When driver requests profile/master-data change; production also uses dedicated request queue
After admin approves request and applies driver data
After admin rejects request; includes admin note when provided
Badge on Infopoint nav; push optional for important news
Only when driver enabled push and filters match; not for direct assign in V1 default

client_feedback_resolved.question: Can driver master data be changed by admins?
client_feedback_resolved.resolution: Yes. Admins may create and edit all driver fields; status, block, archive, and access reset are audited. Drivers submit change requests (not self-service edit); admins resolve via dedicated queue with Approve & save or Reject.

client_feedback_resolved.question: Is the frontend compatible with tablets such as iPad?
client_feedback_resolved.resolution: Phone-first PWA with best-effort responsive layout on tablets; not a separate tablet-optimized target for V1.

client_feedback_resolved.question: Is the audit log in German or English?
client_feedback_resolved.resolution: Audit log action keys remain English for consistency; UI strings localized EN/DE.

client_feedback_resolved.question: Program name AUTHEON
client_feedback_resolved.resolution: Final display name is configurable; AUTHEON must not appear as the product name in UI.

client_feedback_resolved.question: Icon for Report problem
client_feedback_resolved.resolution: Report Problem uses clear label plus warning-style icon in tour detail footer.
